extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE attacked on the final Mur de Huy ascent with 1.3km to go, held off FUGLSANG's late surge to win back-to-back.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE punctured mid-race but Quick-Step left him with only DEVENYNS for final support, exposing one-leader strategy vulnerability.
FUGLSANG positioned himself to shadow ALAPHILIPPE before final climb, creating two-rider gap that discouraged chasers.
WELLENS's team Lotto Soudal attacked repeatedly pre-finale to drain rivals, suggesting they prioritized disruption over positioning.
VAN AVERMAET crashed twice, revealing fragility of cobbles specialists in positioning wars on technical Ardennes descents.
WOODS and YATES disappeared from contention despite prominent early positioning, indicating pre-final-climb marking errors cost GC riders.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: won despite mid-race puncture and minimal team support on finale, confirming self-sufficient climbing kick
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: second place despite perfect positioning shadowing winner suggests insufficient explosive power for Mur finish
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: third place salvaged UAE's race after MARTIN dropped early, showing unexpected punch on steepest gradient
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: neutral: team attacked aggressively throughout but rider absent from finale, indicating diesel engine unsuited to Mur
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: crashed twice in positioning battles, exposing tactical overcommitment before decisive terrain
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: prominent at 28km but vanished on final climb despite perfect EF setup
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Mitchelton-Scott pulled early but YATES absent from finale, suggesting premature effort expenditure
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: outside top-10 despite teammate VAN AVERMAET's leadout attempt, rare Mur failure for specialist
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: top-5 finish without visible team support indicates self-sufficient Ardennes climbing emerging
rider_signals.LAMBRECHT Bjorg: positive: top-5 finish signals breakthrough Ardennes potential before tragic later events
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: top-10 on Mur despite sprinter profile, confirming expanding range on selective climbs
